title: Senior Financial Analyst - Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
